# os_trace_type_enabled(_:)

**Function**

Returns whether the specified info level trace information is enabled.

## Declaration

```swift
func os_trace_type_enabled(_ type: UInt8) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **type**: The type of trace to check. Possible values are [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OS_TRACE_TYPE_DEBUG] and [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OS_TRACE_TYPE_INFO].

## Discussion

Generally, trace points should not involve expensive operations, however some circumstances warrant it. Use this function to do expensive work only when a given level of trace messages are enabled.

## Deprecated Functions

- **os_trace_debug_enabled()**: Returns whether debug level trace information is enabled.
- **os_trace_info_enabled()**: Returns whether info level trace information is enabled.
